analysis.title: GitHub - smith-horn/skillsmith: Skill discovery, security, optimization, and management for agentic systems
analysis.excerpt: Commercial MCP server for Claude Code skill discovery, installation, and management. Semantic search (FTS5 + embedding), trust-tier security model, quality scoring, security scanner, skill-to-skill dependency intelligence, sync engine with SQLite.
analysis.summary: 6 patterns extracted: trust-tier classification, quality scoring with weighted breakdown, security scanning for agent content, dependency intelligence (skill-to-MCP), hybrid search (FTS + semantic), compatibility metadata.

analysis.title: GitHub - inceptyon-labs/TARS: Centralized hub for managing Claude Code resources with apply/rollback and profile-based config sharing
analysis.excerpt: Rust/Tauri desktop app covering skills, agents, commands, hooks, MCP servers, and plugins. Visual editor, profile-based config sharing, collision detection, apply/rollback operations.
analysis.summary: 7 patterns extracted: profile-as-plugin packaging, collision detection across scopes, diff-plan-then-apply with backup, scope hierarchy with precedence, pin/track source tracking, ConfigOps trait, CLAUDE.md overlay modes.

analysis.title: GitHub - christiananagnostou/skillbox: Local-first, agent-agnostic skills manager
analysis.excerpt: TypeScript CLI that installs skills from GitHub repos to canonical store, symlinks to agent directories. Supports user/project scope, auto-detects agents, checksum updates, JSON output.
analysis.summary: 6 patterns extracted: canonical store + symlink fan-out, agent-agnostic scope model, auto-detect agents, checksum update detection, GitHub repo as multi-skill catalog, self-referential skill bootstrap.

analysis.title: GitHub - walidboulanouar/ay-claude-templates: CLI tool for AY Claude Platform - package manager for Claude Code extensions
analysis.excerpt: Node.js CLI managing 7 content types (skills, agents, commands, hooks, plugins, MCPs, settings). Supabase-backed marketplace (placeholder), local registry.json, bundle/collection install.
analysis.summary: 7 patterns extracted: seven content-type taxonomy, global/local scope with auto-detection, auto-registration in settings.json, bundle/collection install, manifest dependency resolution, version history with rollback, package verification.

analysis.title: GitHub - caliber-ai-org/ai-setup: Continuously sync AI setups across Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex
analysis.excerpt: Node.js CLI that fingerprints codebases, generates platform-specific configs via LLM, syncs with quality gate. Deterministic scoring, manifest-based undo, builtin meta-skills.
analysis.summary: 7 patterns extracted: content-hash state comparison, skill-as-markdown format, federated skill discovery with LLM scoring, deterministic config scoring, manifest-based undo, quality gate on refresh, builtin skills as managed artifacts.

analysis.title: GitHub - skillsgate/skillsgate: npm for AI skills — 80K+ skills catalog with semantic search and security scanning
analysis.excerpt: Desktop app, TUI, and CLI for discovering/installing skills across 18 AI agents. Canonical copy + symlink distribution, lock file, multi-source parser, content-hash sync, security scanning.
analysis.summary: 6 patterns extracted: canonical copy + symlink distribution, lock file for state tracking, multi-source parser with typed resolution, content-hash change detection, security scanning before install, agent-selective removal.

analysis.title: GitHub - lasoons/AgentSkillsManager: Multi-IDE skills management extension with cloud catalog (~58K skills)
analysis.excerpt: VS Code extension managing SKILL.md files across 7 IDEs. Git-cached repo browsing, cloud search via claude-plugins.dev API, hash-based conflict detection, preset + user repo layering.
analysis.summary: 5 patterns extracted: IDE-specific skills directory mapping, cloud catalog search (claude-plugins.dev, 58K skills), hash-based conflict detection, git-cached repo browsing, preset + user repository layering.

analysis.title: GitHub - iannuttall/dotagents: One location for all hooks, commands, skills, and AGENT/CLAUDE.md files
analysis.excerpt: TypeScript CLI establishing .agents folder as canonical source for AI agent config artifacts. Symlink fan-out to 8 clients, migration with conflict resolution, backup+undo, skill frontmatter validation.
analysis.summary: 6 patterns extracted: canonical-source symlink fan-out, dual-scope (global + project), migration with conflict resolution, backup-before-write with timestamped undo, skill frontmatter validation, client-specific path mapping table.

analysis.title: GitHub - Klavis-AI/klavis: Klavis AI:  MCP integration platforms that let AI agents use tools reliably at any scale
analysis.excerpt: MCP integration platform for scaling AI agent tool use.

analysis.title: GitHub - lydakis/mcpx: Turn MCP servers into composable CLIs
analysis.excerpt: Composable CLI wrapper for MCP servers.

analysis.title: GitHub - different-ai/openwork: An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork built for teams, powered by opencode
analysis.excerpt: Team collaboration tool for AI coding agents.

analysis.title: GitHub - rowboatlabs/rowboat: Open-source AI coworker, with memory
analysis.excerpt: AI coworker platform with memory capabilities.

analysis.title: GitHub - zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw: Autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure
analysis.excerpt: Cross-platform autonomous AI assistant infrastructure in Rust.
